evidence: Node Ready condition indicates container runtime outage
Timeline contains kubelet/runtime signal that CRI endpoint is unavailable
Pod is assigned to node node1

causes.message: Kubelet cannot reach the node container runtime service
Node container runtime is unavailable for sandbox and container operations
Kubelet cannot create pod sandboxes or start workloads while runtime is down

pod:sandbox-create-pod: Pod is blocked because kubelet cannot use the node container runtime

likely_causes: containerd or cri-o service is stopped or crashed
Kubelet cannot connect to the CRI socket
Node runtime upgrade or reconfiguration left the runtime unavailable
Underlying host issues are preventing the runtime daemon from starting
suggested_checks: Check containerd/cri-o service status on the node
Inspect kubelet logs for CRI connection errors
